ocr_findings.description: Section heading in OCR reads '09 初期化と上書き' — the '09' prefix does not appear in the image; the image shows a bullet icon (●●) followed by '初期化と上書き'. Spurious numeric prefix inserted, same pattern as page_309.
Callout box text: image reads '試験にはコレが出る！' but OCR outputs '試験にはつしが出る！' — 'コレ' misread as 'つし'. Recurring stylized-font OCR error.
Mascot illustration replaced with img-0.jpeg reference — expected figure behavior.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 初期化と上書き (variable initialization and overwrite) in the programming lesson. Both プログラム例 code blocks (整数型：num←3 and num←2) are faithfully captured. The three bullet-point exam tips in the callout box are correctly transcribed despite the heading error. Two recurring mid-severity pattern errors keep this at WARN.
